titleStmt.title: SII 34.96: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 96. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: The inscription is dated in the 23rd year of some king whose name is lost. Most probably he is a Parakēsarivarman and from the high regnal year he is identified with Parāntaka I. This interesting record tells that the sabhā of the village sold the water rights of an irrigation tank to Chembiyaṉ Vēdivēḷār for 410 kaḻañju of gold. The latter was given the right to construct a sluice from a kaṇṇāṟu (branch channel) and take water for irrigating his lands. It was however clarified that the water rights of the old landowers should not be affected. The sale was made for paying back some loan due to the temple of Kayilāyam in Tiruveḷḷaṟai. The loan (of 30 kaḻañju of gold) was originally taken by a Tāyanīli and by default it became three-fold. Then the right on the loan was transferred to the present temple by some individuals (who perhaps got it from Tāyanīli). As the inscription is built in the beginning, the preceding circumstances are not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
panmarkku yāṇṭu Irupattu mūṉṟāvatu Ivaṉ pakkal muppatiṉ kaḻa
ñcu poṉ koṇṭu kaṭavōmāy Iraṭṭitta piṉpu Ittāya nīli pakkal dāna peṟṟuṭaiya
ttiruveḷḷaṟaik kāccuvaṉ cāmavēdinārāyaṇaṉ tirumālum tampiyum kāccuvaṉ nā
rāyaṇaṉ tāyaṉum tampimārum tañciṟutātai tāyaṉ tiruvikkiramaṉum Ivvanaivaru
m Ittiruveḷḷaṟai śrī kayilāyattu devarkku dānamāka kuṭuttu Addevakaṉmikaḷ E
ṅkaḷai Attirappiyattukku vaḷaikka nāṅkaḷ Iccempiyaṉ vēdi vēḷāriṭaik ko
ṇṭu tanta poṉ 4 100 10 nānūṟṟu patiṉ kaḻaiñcum Āvaṇakkaḷiyē kaiccella Aṟakko
ṇṭu Ic cuṭṭappaṭṭa Ik kuḷattu nīr Icuṭṭappaṭṭa kaṇṇāṟṟēy kumiḻi vaittu teḷi
ṉilattāl vaṭakku nōkkic ceṉṟu pāyap peṟuvatākavum Ikkumiḻi Eṉṟum
tākavum Ikkaṇṇāṟṟāṟu paṇṭu pāyum nilam pāyappeṟuvatākavum Ikkumiḻi Aṭai
muṟaimai nīr pāccināraiyp panmāheśvararēy tāmēṇṭupoṉ tāmēṇṭu
ppeṟuvatākavum Ipparicoṭṭi nīrum nīrkku vaḻiyum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ cētu kuṭuttōm
tiruveṟumpiyūrāḻvār śrīvimāna meḻuntaruḷuvitta kiḷiyūr nāṭṭu ciṟutavūruṭaiyāṉ vēḷā
ṉāṉa cempiyaṉ vētivēḷārkku śrī kaṇṭa caturvveti maṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi
ḷaiya kumāracanmaṉ paṇiyāl Ivvilai yōlai Eḻutiṉēṉ Ivvūr madhyastan dharmma
llicaintu taruṇēntu cēkaraṉēṉ Ivai Eṉ Eḻuttu ....
Digital edition of SII 34.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
